name: nginx-multisite
description: Deploys Nginx as a reverse proxy with three SSL-enabled virtual hosts, self-signed certificate generation, HTTP security headers, UFW firewall, Fail2ban intrusion prevention, kernel sysctl hardening, and SSH hardening. Includes a custom lineinfile LWRP and attribute-driven multi-site configuration.

name: cache
description: Configures a dual caching layer with Memcached (via community cookbook) and Redis (via redisio) including password authentication, a custom log directory, and a post-install Ruby-block workaround to strip deprecated Redis config directives.

name: fastapi-tutorial
description: Performs end-to-end deployment of a Python FastAPI application from a public GitHub repository, including system package installation, Python virtual environment setup, PostgreSQL database and user provisioning, .env file generation, and a systemd service unit for running the app via uvicorn.
